scopes.rationale: Ephemeral worktree cleanup after merge/review handoff.
Local merged/review scratch branch cleanup when the SHA suffix identifies a disposable branch.
Pre-approved branch-protection teardown only when an orchestrator attests to the bounded target.
Temporary-directory cleanup for stale worker artifacts under the caller's TMPDIR.

Joshua-direct 2026-05-20: Jeff-pattern direct-push-to-master for solo-trust repos. Workers were getting blocked saving work across every repo; per jrpfn finding, direct-push is the intended high-velocity workflow. Force-push, rebase, history-rewrite remain blocked by strict_git.
Joshua-direct 2026-05-20: sister of git-push-master-solo-trust for repos using main as default branch (zeststream-cast etc). Same rationale.
